rulings.Case Title: RAJAN RAGHAVAN ET AL VS. JENNIFER CREELMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 10, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTs JENNIFER CREELMAN, ALFRED DRIGGS, IV's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT SUSTAINED as to the Fourth Cause of Action for Invasion of Privacy. Plaintiff fails to specifically state that Defendant entered into a space where Plaintiff had a reasonable expectation of privacy. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend per statute. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOWEN LI AND YONG LIANG, TRANSFEREES, ET AL VS. JAMES D. BANKS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 10, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT JAMES BANKS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. CCP section 1167.3 controls, and Defendant does not meet the CCP section 473(d) standard for relief. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. TURON VS. JENNIFER RODRIGUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Re Defendants' Desposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records Served On Airbnb, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 10, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL TURON's Motion For Protective Order Re Defendants' Desposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records Served On Airbnb, Inc. PARTIALLY GRANTED and PARTIALLY DENIED, subject to opposition. A protective order will be issued as to Defendant's Deposition Subpoena for Production of Business records ordering Airbnb, Inc. to produce all records pertaining to the property located at 2722-2724 Folsom Street. Airbnb must produce the records, but the following shall be redacted: 1) All identifying information for any person not Michael Turon or Jennifer Rodrigue. 2) All financial information. = (501/REQ)
